parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Player {
  log: Logger
  id: Integer
  start_field: ConnectedField
  pieces: List of Piece
  home: List of HomeField
  dest: List of Field
  name: String
  + id: Integer
  + start_field: ConnectedField
  + home: List of HomeField
  + dest: List of Field
  + Player(\n  log: Logger ,\n  player_id: Integer,\n  start_field: ConnectedField,\n  home_obsv: (\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)\n  ),\n  dest_obsv: (\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)\n  ),\n): Player
  - init_home(\n  obsv: (\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)\n  )\n)
  - init_dest(\n  obsv: (\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)\n  )\n)
  + calc_dests(distance: Integer)
  + can_move(): Boolean
  + can_throw(): Boolean
  + has_won(): Boolean
  - wrap_obsv(\n  obsv: (\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n    Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)\n  )\n): (\n  Callable(field: Integer),\n  Callable(field: Integer)\n)
  + __str__(): String
}

class Game {
  log: Logger
  die: Die
  players: List of Player
  all_players: List of Player
  active_player_idx: Integer
  track: List of ConnectedField
  tries: Integer
  allow_move: Boolean
  - active_player: Player
  end_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer)
  begin_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer)
  home_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
  home_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
  track_vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer)
  track_filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)
  dest_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
  dest_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
  game_end_obsv: Callable(winner: Integer)
  + Game(\n  log: Logger,\n  end_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer),\n  begin_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer),\n  home_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n  home_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),\n  track_vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),\n  track_filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),\n  dest_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n  dest_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),\n  game_end_obsv: Callable(winner: Integer),\n): Game
  - init_track()
  + set_players(players: Iterator over (Integer, Boolean))
  + roll_die(): Integer
  + try_move_home(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
  + try_move_track(field_id: Integer)
  + try_move_dest(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
  + allow_move()
  - try_move(src: Field)
  - player(num: int): Player
  - end_move()
  - next_player()
  - begin_turn()
  - begin_move()
}

class Die {
  log: Logger
  pips: Integer
  + Die(log: Logger): Die
  + roll()
  + get(): Integer
  + __str__(): String
}

class HomeField {
  + HomeField(\n  field_id: Integer,\n  log: Logger,\n  start_field: Field,\n  vacate_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),\n  fill_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),\n): HomeField
  + try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  # skip(distance: Integer, player: Player): Optional Field
}

class ConnectedField {
  next_field: Field
  + ConnectedField(\n  field_id: Integer,\n  log: Logger,\n  name: String,\n  vacate_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),\n  fill_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),\n): ConnectedField
  + connect_next(next_field: Field)
  + try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  + is_packed(): Boolean
  # skip(distance: Integer, player: Player)
  - player_next_field(player: Player): Field
}

class Piece {
  log: Logger
  owner: Player
  location: Field
  dest: Optional Field
  + owner: Player
  + dest: Optional Field
  + Piece(\n  log: Logger,\n  piece_id: Integer,\n  owner: Player,\n  location: HomeField,\n): Piece
  + calc_dest(distance: Integer)
  + move_to_home()
  + move_to_dest()
  - move_to(dest: Field)
  + __str__(): String
}

class Field {
  # log: Logger
  id: Integer
  piece: Piece
  + id: Integer
  + piece: Piece
  + occupant: Player
  vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer)
  filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)
  + Field(\n  field_id: Integer,\n  log: Logger,\n  name: String,\n  vacate_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),\n  fill_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),\n): Field
  + vacate()
  + fill(piece: Piece)
  + try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  + is_packed(): Boolean
  # skip(distance: Integer): Optional Field
}

Game "1" *-left- "4" Player
Game "1" *-right- "1" Die
Game "1" *-- "40" ConnectedField
Player "1" *-- "4" HomeField
Player "1" *-- "4" Piece
Player "1" *-- "4" Field
Player "1" *-- "1" ConnectedField
HomeField -up-|> Field
ConnectedField -up-|> Field
ConnectedField "1" o-- "1" Field
Piece "0..1" -right- "1" Field
Field "1" -left- "0..1" Piece

@enduml
```
